element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Single enemies in open space; player learns directional attack differentiation (front vs rear)
First punch immobilizes enemy, enabling successive hits; foundational to all later combat
Available after enemy stunned; introduces grapple-based offense alongside striking
Double-tap directional input enables running punch and flying kick; offensive mobility tool
Pressing down over fallen enemy; situational high-damage option
Gang members attack in groups; requires spacing and targeting strategy
Gang leaders with higher health pools; collar grab/throw only effective when boss health depleted; require attrition strategy
Up/down movement on isometric plane; distinct from left/right combat directions; enables positional offense
Each stage represents new gang with distinct visual/tactical characteristics; narrative/difficulty escalation

typical_relief_triggers: Successful enemy stunlock enabling combo chain
Clear arena of all gang members
typical_tension_triggers: Gang member recovery from stun state
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arena-based attrition with cyclical tension: waves of enemies create local peaks, individual stunlock combos create micro-relief valleys. Boss encounters plateau tension at elevated level until health threshold triggers grapple window. Overall difficulty escalates across four stages toward climactic mob boss confrontation.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stage 1: Tutorial-like; single and paired enemies with straightforward combat mechanics. Introduces punch-stun-combo loop and directional attack system. First boss relatively accessible.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-3: Gang member density increases. Encounters escalate from 2-3 simultaneous enemies to 4+ enemy waves. Running attacks and ground stomp become tactically necessary. Mid-stage bosses require more attrition.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 4: Maximum enemy variety and density. Mob boss represents culmination of all combat systems. Requires mastery of all moves (running punch, flying kick, collar grab, mounted attacks) to manage damage while depleting boss health pool sufficiently for grapple window.
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (Stage 1) - introduces boss damage/health threshold mechanic
Stage 3 mid-point - sharp increase in gang member wave sizes
Final mob boss (Stage 4) - requires sustained execution under pressure with no safe recovery windows until health threshold

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage cycles through encounters: 1-2 solo/paired enemies → small group (3-4) → boss enemy. Pattern repeats with increasing difficulty per stage. Tests player ability to manage arena space and toggle between offensive and defensive positioning.

Boss characters cannot be collar-grabbed or sat-upon until health is sufficiently depleted. This creates a mandatory attrition phase before finishing move becomes available. Distinguishes boss encounters from standard enemy waves mechanically.

Isometric perspective enables vertical (depth) movement distinct from combat left/right direction. Players can circle enemies, approach from background, creating tactical depth beyond simple left-right sideScrolling. Enables running attacks from approach angle.

sources_used: wikipedia - Renegade (video game) / Nekketsu Kōha Kunio-kun
